exemplar.title: To What Extent Is the Calculated Equity in Poker Accurate in Real Life?

detailedExemplarData.title: To What Extent Is the Calculated Equity in Poker Accurate in Real Life?

subject.title: Mathematics Applications & Interpretation (AI)
subject.description:
**IB Mathematics: Applications and Interpretation** is a **Group 5** subject in the **International Baccalaureate Diploma Programme (IBDP)**. It explores **real-world applications of mathematics, statistical analysis, mathematical modeling, and data interpretation**, with a strong focus on **technology use, practical problem-solving, and interpreting mathematical results in context**.

The course is available at **Standard Level (SL, 150 teaching hours)** and **Higher Level (HL, 240 teaching hours)**, with **first assessment in 2021**.

### Assessment at a Glance

| Assessment | Format | SL | HL | Weighting |
|------------|--------|----|----|-----------|
| **Paper 1** | External examination (calculator permitted) | 1h 30min | 2h | SL: 40%, HL: 30% |
| **Paper 2** | External examination (technology required) | 1h 30min | 2h | SL: 40%, HL: 30% |
| **Paper 3** | External examination (technology required) | N/A | 1h | HL: 20% |
| **Mathematical Exploration** | Internal assessment | 30h | 30h | 20% |

strengths: Clear investigative thread with introduction, methodology, calculations and conclusion
Well-formatted contents page and numbered headings aiding navigation
Consistent logical development supporting the research question
weaknesses: Occasional digressions and repeated derivations interrupt flow
Some redundancies in definitions and raw-data tables dilute conciseness
Minor layout issues (LaTeX fragments, line breaks in equations)
feedback.calculationMethod: Holistic AI evaluation: The presentation is coherent and logically developed (band 3) but is held back by repeated material, unnecessary detail in the main text and minor layout glitches. These factors place it in the âmostly relevant with some unnecessary elementsâ category, meriting 2 out of 4.

strengths: Generally correct use of probability notation (P(Aâ©B), nCr) and defined variables
Effective use of tables, graphs and images to support calculations
Explanations are mostly clear and variable names consistent
weaknesses: Typographical slips and inconsistent subscript formatting in formulas
Inconsistent abbreviations for suits and mixing of decimals/percentages
Occasional redundant lines in probability derivations
feedback.calculationMethod: Holistic AI evaluation: Mathematical communication is effective overall (band 3 descriptors met) but marred by notation inconsistencies and minor errors that interrupt clarity. This aligns with âsome appropriate mathematical language and representationsâ warranting 2 out of 4.

strengths: Designing a bespoke 100-hand empirical test shows independent thinking
The choice of fixed hole cards and custom accuracy metric reflects a personal approach
Compilation of raw data and formula derivation demonstrate creativity
weaknesses: Personal voice becomes less evident in later sections
Overall investigation remains within a fairly standard probability framework
feedback.calculationMethod: Holistic AI evaluation: The work exhibits significant evidence of independent thinking, personal initiative and creativity (band 2) but does not reach the outstanding level. Thus it earns 2 out of 3 for Personal Engagement.

strengths: Meaningful reflection on predicted vs. actual outcomes and recognition of variability
Clear connection drawn between equity calculations and strategic understanding
Evaluation table identifies limitations and suggests improvements
weaknesses: Depth of critique is moderate, lacking deeper statistical analysis (confidence intervals, variance)
Missed opportunity to reflect on why no ties occurred
feedback.calculationMethod: Holistic AI evaluation: Reflection is present and meaningful throughout (band 2), with clear but not deeply critical analysis. It falls short of the substantial critique required for band 3, yielding 2 out of 3.

strengths: All mathematics used is relevant and aligned with the syllabus level
Calculations of sample space and probabilities are mostly correct
Demonstrates sound understanding of combinations and conditional probability
weaknesses: Typographical errors in factorial expressions and probability notation
Derivation of tie probability contains notational mix-ups
Lacks advanced statistical techniques (e.g., confidence intervals, variance analysis)
feedback.calculationMethod: Holistic AI evaluation: The mathematical work is solid and largely accurate (band 3) with sound understanding of key tools, but it does not demonstrate the sophistication or rigour of higher bands. As such, it merits 3 out of 6.

strandSelections.reasoning: Choosing a specific hand scenario, designing a 100-hand empirical test and adjusting theoretical equity reveals noticeable independent thinking beyond textbook examples, yet the investigation remains fairly standard in scope and depth; evidence is âsignificantâ but not âoutstandingâ.

Explanations show sound understanding of combinations and dependent events; the student successfully links theory to empirical testing.  However, treatment of deeper statistical ideas (confidence intervals, variance) is absent, so understanding is good but not thorough or rigorous.

Calculations of sample space, event probabilities and accuracy are largely correct; minor algebraic slips (using 45! instead of 30! in a line of working) are typographical and do not propagate to final figures.  Thus accuracy is âmostly correctâ, matching band 3.

Most material directly supports the investigation, yet several portions repeat earlier statements or show working three times (e.g., the remaining-card formula written thrice).  Some screenshots and long raw-data tables could be relegated to the appendix.  Hence the report is âmostly relevantâ but not consistently concise.

The student employs standard probability notation (P(Aâ©B), nCr) and percentage forms correctly in most places; variables are defined in context.  There are occasional typographical slips (âc_a / c_aâ, missing parentheses), so usage is not flawless, but it is largely appropriate and sustained.

Explanations generally read clearly and variable names remain consistent from equations to prose.  Minor inconsistencies (switching between decimal and percentage mid-line) stop the strand from reaching full consistency, so band 3 is most fitting.

All mathematics usedâcombinations, basic conditional probability, percentagesâis relevant and squarely within the HL/SL probability syllabus.  No advanced concepts (e.g., hypergeometric distributions, variance analysis) are attempted, so the work meets but does not exceed the course level.

Multiple formsâequations, tables, a bar graph and card-rank imagesâare used effectively to convey information and aid interpretation.  While the visuals are simple, they match the mathematics and are interpreted in the text, satisfying the âeffective useâ descriptor.

The student reflects on how closely predicted and actual outcomes align, calculates accuracy and recognises variability.  Reflection is woven through conclusion and evaluation, but depth is moderate; links to broader mathematical understanding could be stronger.

Introducing an empirical trial, compiling an extensive raw-data table and deriving a customised âaccuracyâ formula demonstrate creative initiative.  Yet the mathematical techniques themselves (basic combinations and conditional probability) are routine, so the level of creativity is âsignificantâ but not âoutstandingâ.

The report follows a clear investigative thread: introduction, methodology, calculations, data, evaluation and conclusion.  Sections are sensibly sequenced and cross-referenced, so the reader can follow the argument with little difficulty.  Occasional digressions (e.g., repeated formula definitions, duplicated algebra lines) break the flow, preventing the âexcellentâ standard, but overall logical development is consistently apparent.

There is meaningful analysis of discrepancies (e.g., psychological factors, number of players) and calculation of error rates.  Critique remains surface-levelâno exploration of sampling error, variance or model assumptionsâso the strand fits âmeaningful analysis with some critiqueâ.

The student makes explicit connections between calculated equity and enhanced strategic understanding for players, showing how mathematics informs decision-making.  These links are clear but not deeply examined, warranting band 2.

The document is well-structured: a contents page, figure/table lists, numbered headings and a concluding evaluation all point to deliberate organisation.  Minor layout issues (LaTeX code fragments showing, line breaks inside equations) evidence that structure is not seamless, keeping it in the âwell organisedâ rather than âexceptionalâ band.

The exploration is clearly driven by the studentâs interest in poker; decisions on fixed hole cards, data collection and bespoke accuracy metric show a personal approach that shapes the work.  However, this personal voice is less evident in later sections, keeping the strand in band 2.

annotations.comment: The appendix table is very dense and can overwhelm readers; consider summarizing key outcomes or using summary statistics instead of listing all 100 trials.
The research question is clearly stated, framing a focused investigation and providing a strong foundation for logical development.
The table of contents is comprehensive and well formatted, aiding easy navigation and demonstrating clear organization.
Consider moving extensive raw-data tables entirely to the appendix to improve conciseness and maintain reader focus in the main text.
The introductory paragraph offers a clear and accurate definition of equity in poker, enhancing reader understanding of the investigationâs context.
The definition of equity is repeated in successive paragraphs, which interrupts flow. Merge or remove duplicate statements to improve conciseness.
The combination formula nCr is presented accurately with correct notation, demonstrating a solid grasp of relevant mathematical tools.
The block presenting dependent-event probabilities includes an extra line multiplying by P(A), which is redundant and may confuse readers; streamline to the core formula.
Detailing the specific calculator model is unnecessary for mathematical validity. Focus on method rationale and remove device-specific information to tighten presentation.
Abbreviating suits inconsistently (e.g., âs/c/h/dâ) can be unclear. Provide a legend or use standard notation for uniform clarity.
The repeated algebraic derivation of remaining cards (52â2xâf) appears multiple times. Present it once clearly, then refer back to avoid redundancy.
The table of cards in play effectively lists cases, but adding a brief narrative explanation of how the sums were obtained would aid comprehension.
In the calculation of C_a, the factorial expression mistakenly reverts to 45! instead of 30!, indicating a typographical error that should be corrected.
The formula for P(Player B winningâ) uses c_b/c_a instead of c_b/c_t. This notational error propagates probability mistake and needs correction.
The list showing ways to run a full house is presented clearly, using bullet points effectively to convey combinatorial cases.
Subscripts in probability notation (e.g., winningâ) are inconsistently formatted and may confuse the reader; standardize subscript placement and parentheses.
The derivation of tie probability intermixes denominators incorrectly and lacks a clear step-by-step rationale; revise to ensure each term is accurately justified.
Break complex multi-term probability calculations into separate sub-sections or bullets to enhance clarity and avoid reader overload.
The bar graph effectively contrasts predicted and actual outcomes, providing a clear visual representation of the investigationâs key results.
The summary paragraph presents actual vs. predicted wins but does not address why no ties occurred, missing an opportunity for reflective insight.
Consider including confidence intervals or standard deviations when evaluating accuracy, to provide deeper statistical insight into variability.
The conclusion effectively links findings back to the research question and highlights real-world implications of equity calculations.
The discussion overlooks deeper critique of sampling error and variance. Adding critical analysis of model assumptions would strengthen reflection.
The evaluation table systematically identifies limitations and improvement methods, conveying meaningful critical reflection.
Suggest incorporating hypergeometric or Monte Carlo simulations when expanding to multiple players, to quantitatively model more realistic scenarios.
The bibliography includes relevant sources but citation styles are inconsistent; apply a single format (e.g., MLA or APA) uniformly.
The raw data appendix is clearly labeled and separated, preserving the flow of analysis in the main report.
